name: augnes-operator
description: Augnes workflow harness for Codex preflight, bounded implementation, evidence reporting, proof-only closeout, and authority audit; v0.2 aligns adjacent ChatGPT Apps and Codex Plugin surface operations while preserving Augnes authority boundaries.

interface.shortDescription: Use Augnes workflow skills inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Packages approved Augnes workflow skills for Codex context intake, bounded implementation, surface-operation guidance, capsule handoff guidance, evidence-aware reporting, proof-only closeout, and authority audit. This v0.2 metadata alignment does not add hooks, MCP config, app mappings, runtime calls, GitHub calls, OpenAI calls, network calls, or secrets.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Augnes Operator skills to keep Codex work bounded, capsule-handoff-aware, evidence-aware, surface-aware, proof-only at closeout, and aligned with Augnes authority boundaries.
